text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 The Philippines says Chinese Maritime Militia vessels dumped cyanide near the BRP Sierra Madre outpost at Ayungin Shoal in the West Philippine Sea, based on chemical tests from multiple incidents between 2025 and 2026. Officials say yellow bottles retrieved from small wooden boats tested positive for cyanide, warning the substance could harm military personnel, marine life, and coral reefs. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 菲律宾称，根据2025年至2026年间多次事件的化学测试结果，中国海上民兵船只在西菲律宾海的爱尤银礁（Ayungin Shoal）附近的BRP Sierra Madre前哨站附近倾倒了氰化物。官员们表示，从小型木船上回收的黄色瓶子经检测呈氰化物阳性，并警告称该物质可能危害军事人员、海洋生物和珊瑚礁。 @wfwitness

text: 📢 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 Trump: "I'm very disappointed in NATO. They weren't there for us. We pay trillions of dollars for NATO and they weren't there for us... I think that's going to be under very serious examination." 📎 Rapid Response 47
text_zh: 📢 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 特朗普：“我对北约非常失望。他们没有支持我们。我们为北约支付了数万亿美元，但他们没有支持我们……我认为这将受到非常严肃的审查。” 📎 快速反应 47

text: 📢 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 Trump on Pope Leo XIV: "I don't think he's doing a very good job. He likes crime, I guess... I'm not a big fan of Pope Leo. He's a very liberal person — and he's a man that doesn't believe in stopping crime." 📎 Rapid Response 47
text_zh: 📢 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 特朗普谈及教皇利奥十四世：“我认为他做得并不好。我想他喜欢犯罪……我不是教皇利奥的粉丝。他是一个非常自由派的人——而且他不相信打击犯罪。” 📎 快速反应 47

text: Today (April 12), Hezbollah published a total of 60 statements regarding recent operations targeting Israel and the IDF in Israel and southern Lebanon, up from 46 on April 11. This brings their total stated operations since the beginning of the war to 1,711, with an average of 40.74 per day since March 2. Note: Hezbollah only announces a small fraction of the total operations carried out against the IDF, and often combines multiple attacks into one statement. This graph only counts total Hezbollah statements.
text_zh: 今天（4月12日），真主党发布了总计60份关于近期针对以色列和以色列国防军在以色列及黎巴嫩南部行动的声明，高于4月11日的46份。这使得自战争开始以来他们宣布的行动总数达到1,711次，自3月2日以来平均每天40.74次。注：真主党仅宣布了针对以色列国防军所进行行动的一小部分，并且经常将多次袭击合并为一份声明。此图表仅统计真主党的声明总数。

text: WarMonitor Do you want a war with China? Because this is how you get a war with China. The longer the Iran war goes on, the more China suffers. Everyone would like the war to end quickly. But the negative impact on China can't be ignored. - Anthony Pompliano 🌪 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 你想要与中国开战吗？因为这就是你如何引发与中国战争的方式。伊朗战争持续的时间越长，中国受到的损害就越大。每个人都希望战争尽快结束。但对中国的负面影响不容忽视。 - 安东尼·庞普利亚诺（Anthony Pompliano） 🌪 推文

text: 🐻 Here's all the key news of the past 24 hours: ➡️ Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf commented on the talks with the US saying "The United States failed to gain Iran’s trust in response to our initiatives." ➡️ Erdogan criticizes new Israel death penalty for Palestinians ➡️ Vladimir Putin held a phone call with Masoud Pezeshkian ➡️ Trump announces the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, and says NATO will now come and help "clean up the strait" but UK immediately says they are not about that life , and Australia isn't either. However, Trump claims that many countries will help ➡️ IRGC Navy tells Trump that any wrong step in the Strait of Hormuz will put the enemy in deadly whirlpools ➡️ Trump threatens China over help to Iran again, and is upset with the Pope , and apparently sees himself as Jesus now..? ➡️ Israel strikes Lebanon ➡️ Peter Magyar wins the elections 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 以下是过去24小时的所有关键新闻： ➡️ 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）在评论与美国的会谈时表示：“美国未能通过回应我们的倡议来赢得伊朗的信任。” ➡️ 埃尔多安批评以色列针对巴勒斯坦人的新死刑规定 ➡️ 弗拉基米尔·普京与马苏德·佩泽什基安（Masoud Pezeshkian）通了电话 ➡️ 特朗普宣布封锁霍尔木兹海峡，并称北约现在会来帮助“清理海峡”，但英国立即表示他们不打算参与，澳大利亚也不打算参与。然而，特朗普声称许多国家会提供帮助 ➡️ 伊斯兰革命卫队海军告诉特朗普，在霍尔木兹海峡的任何错误举动都会将敌人置于致命的漩涡中 ➡️ 特朗普再次威胁中国不要帮助伊朗，并对教皇感到不满，而且显然现在把自己看作是耶稣……？ ➡️ 以色列袭击黎巴嫩 ➡️ 彼得·马雅尔（Peter Magyar）赢得选举 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 15 on mass emigration wave: "The new emigrants are no longer ashamed, on the contrary." Israelis cite security, economic, and mental difficulties: "The ethos of sacrifice has become very shallow. You can't ask people to sacrifice when they no longer believe they're sacrificing for something right." The report compares it to pre-October 7th refusal movements, when "our enemies invaded our borders because they thought we were weak." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 以色列第15频道关于大规模移民潮的报道：“新移民不再感到羞耻，恰恰相反。”以色列人列举了安全、经济和心理方面的困难：“牺牲的精神已经变得非常肤浅。当人们不再相信他们是在为正确的事情做出牺牲时，你就不能要求他们做出牺牲。”该报道将其与10月7日之前的拒绝服役运动进行了比较，当时“我们的敌人入侵了我们的边界，因为他们认为我们很软弱。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 If this report from Barak Ravid is accurate, these aren’t negotiations, these are humiliating surrender terms designed to strip Iran of its dignity and defense capabilities. Iran has every right to spit on these humiliating surrender terms and reject them with contempt.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 如果巴拉克·拉维德（Barak Ravid）的这份报告准确，那么这些根本不是谈判，而是旨在剥夺伊朗尊严和防御能力的羞辱性投降条款。伊朗完全有权唾弃这些羞辱性的投降条款，并予以蔑视拒绝。

text: WarMonitor That assumes China and other Asian economies can and are willing to pivot overnight, they can’t. Now regional partners absorb the fallout and blame the U.S. even more, while Americans pay higher prices. At this point, it’s hard to see a strategy at all, just an effort to make it look like there is one. Honestly, Trump ordering navy to block the Strait of Hormuz is a pretty smart strategy. It took away the only Trump card that IRAN has while re-routing the global oil dependency to US. However, it’s unsure whether US or IRAN can afford longer in this case. I don’t think a country that couldn’t afford the market to dip 15% can outlast a country has been economically sanctioned for 40 years. - Mao BaoBao tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这假设中国和其他亚洲经济体能够并且愿意在一夜之间进行调整，但他们做不到。现在区域合作伙伴吸收了后果并更加指责美国，而美国人却支付了更高的价格。在这一点上，很难看出有什么战略，只是在努力让它看起来像是有战略一样。老实说，特朗普命令海军封锁霍尔木兹海峡是一个相当聪明的策略。它夺走了伊朗唯一的王牌，同时将全球石油依赖重新导向美国。然而，在这种情况下，不确定美国或伊朗谁能承受更长时间。我不认为一个无法承受市场下跌15%的国家，能够比一个被经济制裁了40年的国家坚持得更久。 - 毛宝宝（Mao BaoBao） 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump on negotiations with Iran: Oh, I don’t know. I don’t care if they come back or not. If they don’t come back, I’m fine. Their military is gone. Their missiles are largely depleted. The manufacturing capability for missiles and drones is largely defeated. We’ve been very nice. We haven’t taken down too many bridges. We did one only because they broke their word. They broke their promise. And remember, their promise was that they were going to open the Hormuz Strait. They didn’t do it. They lied. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普关于与伊朗的谈判：哦，我不知道。我不在乎他们是否回来。如果他们不回来，我没意见。他们的军队已经完了。他们的导弹大部分已耗尽。导弹和无人机的制造能力大部分已被摧毁。我们一直很客气。我们没有摧毁太多的桥梁。我们只摧毁了一座，因为他们违背了诺言。他们违背了他们的承诺。记住，他们的承诺是他们会开放霍尔木兹海峡。他们没有做到。他们撒谎了。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters : Oil tankers are avoiding the Strait of Hormuz due to a US blockade set to begin on Monday, following failed peace talks between the US and Iran. Pakistan-flagged vessels Shalamar and Khairpur entered the Gulf, with Shalamar heading to the United Arab Emirates to load Das crude and Khairpur bound for Kuwait to load refined products. At the same time, mixed traffic patterns were observed. The Liberia-flagged VLCC Mombasa B successfully transited the strait and is now operating in the Gulf, while the Malta-flagged Agios Fanourios I turned back after attempting to enter and is anchored near the Gulf of Oman. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：由于美伊和平谈判失败，美国将于周一开始封锁，油轮正在避开霍尔木兹海峡。悬挂巴基斯坦国旗的“Shalamar”号和“Khairpur”号进入海湾，“Shalamar”号前往阿拉伯联合酋长国装载Das原油，“Khairpur”号前往科威特装载成品油。与此同时，观察到了混合的交通模式。悬挂利比里亚国旗的超大型油轮（VLCC）“Mombasa B”号成功通过海峡，目前正在海湾作业，而悬挂马耳他国旗的“Agios Fanourios I”号在试图进入后掉头，目前停泊在阿曼湾附近。 @wfwitness

"Well, they're coming up. They're gonna be coming up. But I'm very disappointed in NATO. They didn't do the they weren't there for us. But NATO was not there for us." @wfwitness

text: — I’m not a Christian. Nor am I particularly fond of Pope Leo XIV. In fact, quite the opposite. But, whether you like it or not, the Pope represents the religion of 1.4 billion Catholics worldwide. And, in a general sense, the Pope as an institution has always been an advocate for peace around the world, whether we agree with their specific statements or not (as Muslims we certainly have our reservations) Pope Francis for example did a lot for Gaza, he spoke out openly against Israel many times, and he was overall a mostly respectable man. Anyway, Trump needs to put some respect on Pope Leo’s name. Catholics can’t keep allowing him to use their religion only when it benefits him, then thrashing the Pope on a random Monday evening during an ego trip. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 我不是基督徒。我也不特别喜欢教皇利奥十四世。事实上，恰恰相反。但是，无论你是否喜欢，教皇代表着全世界14亿天主教徒的宗教。而且，从广义上讲，教皇作为一个机构一直是世界和平的倡导者，无论我们是否同意他们的具体声明（作为穆斯林，我们当然有保留意见）。例如，教皇方济各为加沙做了很多事情，他多次公开反对以色列，总体上是一个大部分受人尊敬的人。无论如何，特朗普需要对教皇利奥的名字表示尊重。天主教徒不能一直允许他在对自己有利时利用他们的宗教，然后在某个随机的周一晚上，在自我膨胀的过程中抨击教皇。 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Me and my friends be like:
text_zh: 我和我的朋友们是这样的：

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ "I don't think he's doing a very good job. HE LIKES CRIME, I guess... I'm not a big fan of Pope Leo. He's a very LIBERAL person -- and he's a man that doesn't believe in stopping crime."
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ “我认为他做得并不好。我想他喜欢犯罪……我不是教皇利奥的粉丝。他是一个非常自由派的人——而且他不相信打击犯罪。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump reports that the two rescued U.S. F-15 crew members are in good condition. Reporter: "Give us an update, mister president, on the two pilots. Are they in good condition? Have you spoken in order to see..." Trump: "They are in…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 U.S. President Trump clarified his comments about Pope Leo XIV liking crime: "I don't think he's doing a very good job. He likes crime, I guess. He, he hit us. Think of it. He's worried about fear. What about the fear when the ministers and the priests and the all of those great people that were arrested during COVID, and in many cases, they're outside 10 feet apart, and they were arrested. So we don't like it. We don't like a pope that's gonna say that it's okay to have a nuclear weapon. We don't want a pope that says crime is okay in our cities. I don't like it. I'm not a big fan of Pope Leo." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普报告称，两名获救的美国F-15机组人员状况良好。记者：“总统先生，请给我们更新一下两名飞行员的情况。他们状况良好吗？您是否已经谈过以查看……” 特朗普：“他们处于……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 美国总统特朗普澄清了他关于教皇利奥十四世喜欢犯罪的评论：“我认为他做得并不好。我想他喜欢犯罪。他，他攻击了我们。想想看。他担心恐惧。当部长、牧师以及所有那些在新冠疫情期间被捕的伟大人物，在许多情况下，他们站在外面相隔10英尺，却被逮捕了。所以我们不喜欢这样。我们不喜欢一个会说拥有核武器是可以的教皇。我们不想要一个说在我们的城市里犯罪是可以的教皇。我不喜欢它。我不是教皇利奥的粉丝。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender Following comments by Pope Leo XIV and three U.S. cardinals that were critical of U.S.-Israeli operations against Iran and Lebanese Hezbollah, U.S. President Donald J. Trump criticized the Pope, calling him “weak on crime, and terrible for foreign policy.” He went on to criticize the Catholic Church’s treatment of priest and ministers during the COVID-19 epidemic, while praising the Pope’s brother Louis for his support of the administration. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在教皇利奥十四世和三位美国红衣主教批评美以针对伊朗和黎巴嫩真主党的行动后，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普批评了教皇，称他“在打击犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策上糟糕”。他接着批评了天主教会对新冠疫情期间牧师和部长们的对待方式，同时赞扬了教皇的兄弟路易斯对政府的支持。 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump on US-Iran negotiations tonight: "I don't care if they come back or not. If they don't come back, I'm fine." https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043504697907056758/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普今晚谈及美伊谈判：“我不在乎他们是否回来。如果他们不回来，我没意见。” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043504697907056758/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump is going after Pope Leo in a new post, calling him “weak on crime” and accusing him of siding with critics of the Trump administration on issues like Iran and U.S. foreign policy. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043503085725610363/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普在一篇新帖子中攻击教皇利奥，称他“在打击犯罪方面软弱”，并指责他在伊朗和美国外交政策等问题上站在特朗普政府批评者的一边。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043503085725610363/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that Iran lied and did not open the Strait of Hormuz as it said it would. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普称伊朗撒谎，并没有像它所说的那样开放霍尔木兹海峡。 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says the blockade that will be imposed on Iran will be 'very effective'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普称将对伊朗实施的封锁将“非常有效”。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump doesn't care if Iran doesn't come back to the negotiation table. "Oh, I don't know. I don't care if they come back or not. If they don't come back, I'm fine. Their military is gone. Their missiles are largely depleted. The manufacturing…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump reports that the two rescued U.S. F-15 crew members are in good condition. Reporter: "Give us an update, mister president, on the two pilots. Are they in good condition? Have you spoken in order to see..." Trump: "They are in very good shape, and we're very proud of them, the two pilots. Yeah." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普不在乎伊朗是否回到谈判桌。“哦，我不知道。我不在乎他们是否回来。如果他们不回来，我没意见。他们的军队已经完了。他们的导弹大部分已耗尽。制造……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普报告称，两名获救的美国F-15机组人员状况良好。记者：“总统先生，请给我们更新一下两名飞行员的情况。他们状况良好吗？您是否已经谈过以查看……” 特朗普：“他们状况非常好，我们为他们感到非常自豪，这两名飞行员。是的。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump said that Iran is in bad shape and very desperate, reiterating that he will not allow Iran to have a nuclear weapon. "I think Iran is in very bad shape. I think they're very desperate. We had a meeting that lasted twenty one hours.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump doesn't care if Iran doesn't come back to the negotiation table. "Oh, I don't know. I don't care if they come back or not. If they don't come back, I'm fine. Their military is gone. Their missiles are largely depleted. The manufacturing capability for missiles and drones is largely defeated. We've been very nice. We haven't ripped down too many bridges. We did one only because they broke their word, they broke their promise. And remember, their promise was that they were going to open the Hormuz Strait. They didn't do it. They lied." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗处境糟糕且非常绝望，重申他不会允许伊朗拥有核武器。“我认为伊朗处境非常糟糕。我认为他们非常绝望。我们进行了一次持续二十一小时的会议……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普不在乎伊朗是否回到谈判桌。“哦，我不知道。我不在乎他们是否回来。如果他们不回来，我没意见。他们的军队已经完了。他们的导弹大部分已耗尽。导弹和无人机的制造能力大部分已被摧毁。我们一直很客气。我们没有摧毁太多的桥梁。我们只摧毁了一座，因为他们违背了诺言，他们违背了他们的承诺。记住，他们的承诺是他们会开放霍尔木兹海峡。他们没有做到。他们撒谎了。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump reports the naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will go into effect at 10am tomorrow. "We have a lot of people. As you know, at 10:00 tomorrow, we have a blockade going into effect. That'll be 10:00 tomorrow. Other nations…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said that Iran is in bad shape and very desperate, reiterating that he will not allow Iran to have a nuclear weapon. "I think Iran is in very bad shape. I think they're very desperate. We had a meeting that lasted twenty one hours. We understand the situation better than anybody, and Iran's in very bad shape. And and just so you understand, Iran will not have a nuclear weapon. We'll not have. There is no way that they're gonna get they still want it, and they made that clear the other night. Iran will not have a nuclear weapon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普报告称，霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁将于明天上午10点生效。“我们有很多人。如你所知，明天10点，我们将实施封锁。那将是明天10点。其他国家……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗处境糟糕且非常绝望，重申他不会允许伊朗拥有核武器。“我认为伊朗处境非常糟糕。我认为他们非常绝望。我们进行了一次持续二十一小时的会议。我们比任何人都更了解情况，伊朗处境非常糟糕。为了让你明白，伊朗不会拥有核武器。不会拥有。他们绝不可能得到它——他们仍然想要它，他们前几天晚上说得很清楚。伊朗不会拥有核武器。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump reports the naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will go into effect at 10am tomorrow. "We have a lot of people. As you know, at 10:00 tomorrow, we have a blockade going into effect. That'll be 10:00 tomorrow. Other nations are working so that Iran will not be able to sell oil, and that would be very effective." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普报告称，霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁将于明天上午10点生效。“我们有很多人。如你所知，明天10点，我们将实施封锁。那将是明天10点。其他国家正在努力，这样伊朗将无法出售石油，这将非常有效。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: Hormuz Blockade Starts on Monday at 10:00 AM
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：霍尔木兹海峡封锁于周一上午10:00开始

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Trump’s Narcissistic Rant: Slams Pope Leo XIV as “Weak”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 特朗普的自恋咆哮：抨击教皇利奥十四世为“软弱”

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump criticizes Pope Leo XIV says, "If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican," and that he should "get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043499749626495400/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 特朗普批评教皇利奥十四世，称“如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈”，并表示他应该“作为教皇端正自己的行为，运用常识，停止迎合激进左派，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043499749626495400/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Rep. Eric Swalwell is suspending his campaign for California governor after multiple women accused him of sexual misconduct, including a former staffer who says she was too intoxicated to consent, as calls grew within his own party for him to step aside. He denies the allegations and says he will fight them. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 加州众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（Eric Swalwell）在多名女性指控其性行为不端后，正在暂停其加州州长竞选活动，其中包括一名声称自己在醉酒状态下无法同意的前员工，因为他所在党派内部要求他下台的呼声越来越高。他否认了这些指控，并表示将进行抗争。 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that Iran will be prevented from selling oil under US blockade. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普称伊朗将在美国封锁下被禁止出售石油。 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump criticism of Pope Leo on crime and foreign policy. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043497151951786005/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普对教皇利奥在犯罪和外交政策上的批评。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043497151951786005/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump lashes out at the Pope tonight, calling him "WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy." https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043496483681448148/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普今晚抨击教皇，称他“在打击犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策上糟糕。” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043496483681448148/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church! President DONALD J. TRUMP." tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“教皇利奥在打击犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策上糟糕。他谈到对特朗普政府的“恐惧”，但没有提到天主教会和所有其他基督教组织在新冠疫情期间的恐惧，当时他们逮捕了牧师、部长以及其他人，仅仅因为他们举行教堂礼拜，即使是在外面，相隔十英尺甚至二十英尺。我喜欢他的兄弟路易斯胜过喜欢他，因为路易斯完全是MAGA（让美国再次伟大）。他懂，而利奥不懂！我不想要一个认为伊朗拥有核武器是可以的教皇。我不想要一个认为美国攻击委内瑞拉是糟糕的教皇，委内瑞拉是一个向美国输送大量毒品，更糟糕的是，将包括杀人犯、毒贩和凶手在内的囚犯清空到我们国家的国家。我不想要一个批评美国总统的教皇，因为我正在做我被选民以压倒性优势选出来要做的事情，在犯罪率方面创下历史新低，并创造了历史上最伟大的股市。利奥应该心存感激，因为正如每个人所知，他是一个令人震惊的惊喜。他不在任何教皇候选名单上，教会之所以选他，只是因为他是美国人，他们认为这是应对唐纳德·J·特朗普总统的最佳方式。如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈。不幸的是，利奥在打击犯罪方面软弱，在核武器问题上软弱，这让我很不舒服，他会见像大卫·阿克塞尔罗德（David Axelrod）这样的奥巴马同情者，一个来自左派的失败者，他也是那些想要逮捕教堂礼拜者和神职人员的人之一，这让我更不舒服。利奥应该作为教皇端正自己的行为，运用常识，停止迎合激进左派，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。这对他伤害很大，更重要的是，这正在伤害天主教会！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” 推文

text: 📢 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 Trump lashes out at the Pope tonight, calling him "WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy." Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church! President DONALD J. TRUMP 📎 OSINTtechnical
text_zh: 📢 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 特朗普今晚抨击教皇，称他“在打击犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策上糟糕。” 教皇利奥在打击犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策上糟糕。他谈到对特朗普政府的“恐惧”，但没有提到天主教会和所有其他基督教组织在新冠疫情期间的恐惧，当时他们逮捕了牧师、部长以及其他人，仅仅因为他们举行教堂礼拜，即使是在外面，相隔十英尺甚至二十英尺。我喜欢他的兄弟路易斯胜过喜欢他，因为路易斯完全是MAGA。他懂，而利奥不懂！我不想要一个认为伊朗拥有核武器是可以的教皇。我不想要一个认为美国攻击委内瑞拉是糟糕的教皇，委内瑞拉是一个向美国输送大量毒品，更糟糕的是，将包括杀人犯、毒贩和凶手在内的囚犯清空到我们国家的国家。我不想要一个批评美国总统的教皇，因为我正在做我被选民以压倒性优势选出来要做的事情，在犯罪率方面创下历史新低，并创造了历史上最伟大的股市。利奥应该心存感激，因为正如每个人所知，他是一个令人震惊的惊喜。他不在任何教皇候选名单上，教会之所以选他，只是因为他是美国人，他们认为这是应对唐纳德·J·特朗普总统的最佳方式。如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈。不幸的是，利奥在打击犯罪方面软弱，在核武器问题上软弱，这让我很不舒服，他会见像大卫·阿克塞尔罗德这样的奥巴马同情者，一个来自左派的失败者，他也是那些想要逮捕教堂礼拜者和神职人员的人之一，这让我更不舒服。利奥应该作为教皇端正自己的行为，运用常识，停止迎合激进左派，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。这对他伤害很大，更重要的是，这正在伤害天主教会！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 📎 OSINTtechnical

text: Trump is insulting the Pope A low even lower than this Jewish slave can be
text_zh: 特朗普在侮辱教皇，这甚至比这个犹太奴隶还要低级

text: 🇺🇸 Today's "Who's Trump upset with?" game - the Pope! Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church! President DONALD J. TRUMP 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
